# Imed Ben Fatma

Personal portfolio and professional information of Imed Ben Fatma, a Full-Stack Software Developer & QA Automation Engineer based in Tunisia.

## Core Navigation & Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/) - Main page with intro, pillars of expertise, and contact options.
- [Online CV](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/cv) - Complete interactive curriculum vitae.
- [B-CAR Project](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/projects/b-car) - Case study of the car reservation web platform.
- [novoPharma Project](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/projects/novopharma) - Case study of the pharmacy management desktop application.
- [QA Projects](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/projects/qa) - Case study of QA automation engineering, E2E testing, and CI/CD pipelines.

## External Profiles

- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/Imed-Ben-Fatma) - Open-source repositories and contributions.
- [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/imed-ben-fatma-061b101a3/) - Professional networking and work history.

## Core Competencies

- **Web Development**: Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript.
- **Mobile Development**: Flutter, Dart.
- **Software QA**: Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, JUnit, Automated E2E testing.
